retry_reason: kref_put always succeeds if the object is valid; retrying after a put would cause a double-free.
contract_summary: Release (put) wrapper for a reference-counted string (`__counted char *`). It decrements the kref count via `kref_put` and will free the underlying memory when the count reaches zero. The caller must not use the string pointer after calling this function. Passing NULL is safe and is a no-op. This function is the counterpart to an earlier get or allocation that established the caller's reference.
